requirement_topic.en: ANDE Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz and Project Approval
requirement_topic.zh: ANDE并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及项目批准
requirement_topic.zht: ANDE併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及項目批准

summary.en: ANDE (Administración Nacional de Electricidad) is Paraguay's state vertically integrated electricity utility and the de-facto electricity-sector authority. Grid-connected EV charger installations require project-level coordination with ANDE for service capacity, metering, protection settings, load management, civil and electrical installation acceptance, and commissioning. Paraguay's low-voltage grid context is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, nominally aligned with China's domestic voltage and frequency. However, charger projects must still confirm ANDE connection terms, local installation rules, utility metering, demand impact, and any site-specific power-quality requirements before energisation.
summary.zh: ANDE（国家电力管理局）是巴拉圭国家垂直一体化电力企业，也是实际电力行业主管机关。并网电动汽车充电桩安装须与ANDE进行项目级协调，包括供电容量、计量、保护设置、负载管理、土建及电气安装验收和调试。巴拉圭低压电网背景为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，名义上与中国国内电压和频率一致。但充电桩项目在送电前仍须确认ANDE接入条款、当地安装规则、公用事业计量、负荷影响及任何现场特定电能质量要求。
summary.zht: ANDE（國家電力管理局）是巴拉圭國家垂直一體化電力企業，也是實際電力行業主管機關。併網電動汽車充電樁安裝須與ANDE進行項目級協調，包括供電容量、計量、保護設置、負載管理、土建及電氣安裝驗收和調試。巴拉圭低壓電網背景為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，名義上與中國國內電壓和頻率一致。但充電樁項目在送電前仍須確認ANDE接入條款、當地安裝規則、公用事業計量、負荷影響及任何現場特定電能質量要求。

standards_or_laws: ANDE (Administración Nacional de Electricidad) project-level technical approval for grid-connected electrical installations
Paraguay grid parameters: 220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — power quality, harmonics, flicker, emissions and immunity where requested by ANDE or project owner
Project-specific ANDE connection agreement and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are designed around GB/T 18487.1-2023 general requirements, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC chargers, and local grid-operator acceptance. China also uses 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, so voltage and frequency are not the main Paraguay gap. The gap is that Chinese grid acceptance, metering configuration, protection settings, and domestic installation documentation are not transferable to ANDE project approval.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装以GB/T 18487.1-2023通用要求、GB/T 20234接口、直流充电桩GB/T 27930-2023通信及当地电网运营商验收为基础。中国同样采用220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，因此电压和频率不是巴拉圭的主要差距。差距在于中国电网验收、计量配置、保护设置和国内安装文件不可转移为ANDE项目批准。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝以GB/T 18487.1-2023通用要求、GB/T 20234接口、直流充電樁GB/T 27930-2023通訊及當地電網運營商驗收為基礎。中國同樣採用220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，因此電壓和頻率不是巴拉圭的主要差距。差距在於中國電網驗收、計量配置、保護設置和國內安裝文件不可轉移為ANDE項目批准。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an ANDE-facing grid dossier covering input ratings for 220/380 V 50 Hz, single-line diagram, load calculation, metering concept, protection and earthing design, harmonic and flicker data, commissioning plan, Spanish installation instructions, and local installer responsibilities. The nominal voltage match with China is helpful, but it does not remove the need for ANDE approval and site-specific connection terms.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备面向ANDE的并网资料包，涵盖220/380 V 50 Hz输入额定值、单线图、负荷计算、计量方案、保护及接地设计、谐波和闪烁数据、调试计划、西班牙语安装说明及当地安装方职责。与中国名义电压一致是有利因素，但不免除ANDE批准和现场特定接入条款要求。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備面向ANDE的併網資料包，涵蓋220/380 V 50 Hz輸入額定值、單線圖、負荷計算、計量方案、保護及接地設計、諧波和閃爍數據、調試計劃、西班牙語安裝說明及當地安裝方職責。與中國名義電壓一致是有利因素，但不免除ANDE批准和現場特定接入條款要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — ANDE project approval, connection terms, metering and commissioning acceptance must be confirmed before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ANDE approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Paraguay's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid reduces voltage redesign risk, but it does not make a China domestic charger installation package ANDE-ready. Confirm ANDE connection terms, metering, protection, load impact, and commissioning requirements for each site before shipment or energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拉圭220/380 V 50 Hz电网降低了电压重新设计风险，但并不意味着中国国内充电桩安装资料包可直接满足ANDE要求。出货或送电前，应针对每个站点确认ANDE接入条款、计量、保护、负荷影响和调试要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拉圭220/380 V 50 Hz電網降低了電壓重新設計風險，但並不意味著中國國內充電樁安裝資料包可直接滿足ANDE要求。出貨或送電前，應針對每個站點確認ANDE接入條款、計量、保護、負荷影響和調試要求。
